title: oprun flow
description: A configurable task runner flow executed by the oprun CLI.

name.description: Flow identifier. Also the basename of the built-in flow file and the state file at ~/.local/state/oprun/<name>.json.

vars.description: Variables prompted at the start of the flow. Referenced as {name} in run/dir/prompt/options_cmd fields.

nodes.description: Top-level nodes, executed in order. A node that ends (either has no branch, or its branch subtree completes) falls through to the next sibling.

name.description: Variable name; usable as {name} in run/dir/prompt/options_cmd.

prompt.description: Label shown in the huh input prompt. Defaults to the variable name.

default.description: Fallback default when nothing is saved from a previous run.

node.description: A flow step. Type is optional and defaults to 'exec'. Branch subtrees (on_yes/on_no/do/options[].do) are nested lists of nodes.

id.description: Optional. Required only if another node needs to `goto` here, or if you want confirm/static-choose answers persisted across runs (state is keyed by id).

type.description: Node kind. Omitting it defaults to 'exec'.

run.description: Shell command, run via `bash -c`. Supports {var} substitution.

dir.description: Working directory for the command. Supports {var} substitution.

capture.description: If set, the command's stdout (trimmed) is stored in the named variable and persisted.

prompt.description: Question shown by huh.Confirm. Supports {var} substitution.

on_yes.description: Subtree run when the user picks Yes. Omit to fall through to the next sibling.

on_no.description: Subtree run when the user picks No. Omit to fall through to the next sibling.

prompt.description: Header shown by huh.Select/MultiSelect. Supports {var} substitution.

multi.description: Allow multiple selections. When true and `store` is set, the variable gets a list.

store.description: Optional variable name in which to store the selected value(s). Required on dynamic choose (options_cmd) if you want to reference the selection downstream.

options.description: Static options. Each option may carry its own subtree (`do`) or a `goto`. Exclusive with options_cmd.

options_cmd.description: Dynamic options. Shell command whose stdout lines become options. A line of the form '<label>\t<value>' splits into shown label + stored value; a line with no tab is used for both. Exclusive with options.

prompt.description: Label shown by huh.Input. Defaults to the store name.

store.description: Variable name to write. Persisted across runs as the default value.

goto.description: Top-level node `id` to jump to. Execution resumes linearly from there.

var.description: Name of a list variable to iterate over (typically from a multi-`choose` with `store`).

as.description: Optional loop-variable name. Defaults to `var` (the list is shadowed during the iteration and restored after).

option.description: A static choice under `choose.options`. Must define exactly one of `do` or `goto` (or neither, to simply store the selection and fall through).

label.description: Displayed and stored value for this option.

do.description: Subtree run when this option is selected.

goto.description: Top-level node id to jump to when this option is selected.
